Operation.Documentation: Constructs a JsonSerializer instance that can serialize domain model classes in the given package.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Constructs a JsonSerializer instance that can serialize domain model classes in the given package.
Operation.Name: JsonSerializer

Operation.Documentation: Serializes the given object to the filename.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Serializes the given object to the filename.
Operation.Name: serialize

Operation.Documentation: Deserializes and returns the object stored in the given file.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Deserializes and returns the object stored in the given file.
Operation.Name: deserialize

Operation.Documentation: Sets up the XStream aliases for model classes to make the output JSON more human-friendly.For example, "ca.mcgill.ecse.biketourplus.model.BikeTour" -> "BikeTour"
Operation.Documentation_plain: Sets up the XStream aliases for model classes to make the output JSON more human-friendly.For example, "ca.mcgill.ecse.biketourplus.model.BikeTour" -> "BikeTour"
Operation.Name: setupXStreamAliases

Operation.Documentation: Formats the input JSON string to make it easier for humans to read. Based on stackoverflow.com/a/46519130.<br>For example:<br>Before: {@code {"licencePlate":"XYZ123","inRepairShop":false}}<br>After:<pre>{"licencePlate": "XYZ123","inRepairShop": false}<pre>
Operation.Documentation_plain:
Formats the input JSON string to make it easier for humans to read. Based on stackoverflow.com/a/46519130.
For example:
Before: {@code {"licencePlate":"XYZ123","inRepairShop":false}}
After:
{"licencePlate": "XYZ123","inRepairShop": false}
Operation.Name: formatJsonString

Operation.Documentation:
Update manager account and password so that the account is accurate

@author Lukas Bebee
Operation.Documentation_plain: Update manager account and password so that the account is accurate @author Lukas Bebee
Operation.Name: updateManager
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: String of error message (empty string if no error)
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: String of error message (empty string if no error)

Parameter.Documentation: the new password that the Manager wants to set
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the new password that the Manager wants to set
Parameter.Name: password

a populated TOBikeTour object with all the bike tour information needed

Parameter.Name: weekAvailableFrom

Parameter.Name: weekAvailableUntil
